name: Birdman Inc.
summary: Birdman Inc. engages in the branding, promotion, and business development activities. It offers integrated marketing communications, and brand/product/service strategy planning; planning and execution of advertising campaigns and strategic PR; consulting; business planning; brand story, prototyping/PoC, and UI/UX development; CI and VI planning; TVCM planning and production; packaging and space design; and Web/app, Web movie, and graphic production, as well as invests in startups. The company was formerly known as a dot co.,ltd and changed its name to Birdman Inc. in February 2021. Birdman Inc. was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
